title: Emu/Tern CC battery - CC battery level less than 30%, yellow icon
scenario: Verify that the battery icon on the Home screen turns yellow when the Emu/Tern CC battery level drops below 30%.
steps: Check the battery level of the Emu/Tern CC.
If the battery level is less than 30%, observe the battery icon on the Home screen.
expected: The battery icon on the Home screen should display as yellow.
